titles.title: Mullica River Watershed Wild and Scenic River Study Act of 2026
Mullica River Watershed Wild and Scenic River Study Act of 2026
A bill to amend the Wild and Scenic Rivers Act to designate the Mullica River watershed in New Jersey for study for potential designation as a wild and scenic river, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources.
